name: send-gmail
description: Send emails via Gmail using OAuth2. Supports HTML and plain text email bodies.

OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Secret path for the Gmail OAuth2 token (e.g. 'google/gmail_oauth_token')

BODY.description: Email body content (plain text or HTML)

FROM.description: Sender email address (must match the authenticated Gmail account)

setup_instructions.title: Create a Google Cloud project
setup_instructions.detail: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com, create a new project, and enable the Gmail API under 'APIs & Services > Library'.

setup_instructions.title: Configure OAuth consent screen
setup_instructions.detail: In 'APIs & Services > OAuth consent screen', configure the app (External or Internal). Add the 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send' scope.

setup_instructions.title: Create OAuth credentials
setup_instructions.detail: In 'APIs & Services > Credentials', create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID. Choose 'Web application'. Add your redirect URI.

setup_instructions.title: Obtain refresh token
setup_instructions.detail: Use the OAuth flow to authorize your Gmail account. Store the resulting refresh token (long-lived) rather than the short-lived access token.

setup_instructions.title: Store token as secret
setup_instructions.detail: Use set_secret to store the refresh token: key_path='google/gmail_oauth_token', value='your-refresh-token'.
